care.light: Bright light; morning sun is ideal.
care.water: Keep evenly moist; avoid soggy soil.
care.temperature: Prefers cool-to-mild temps; protect from heat spikes.

culturalNotesByRegion.US: Common in fall decor and bouquets.

care.light: 喜明亮光照，早晨日照更佳。
care.water: 保持土壤微湿，避免积水。
care.temperature: 喜凉爽，注意避免高温暴晒。

culturalNotesByRegion.CN: 常被视为清雅、坚韧与秋意的象征。

en.symbolism: A quiet reminder that consistency beats intensity. Choose one small thing to do well today, then let the rest be simple.
en.appreciation: Notice one color in the petals. Breathe in for 4 counts, out for 6. Write one sentence: “Today I will keep it steady by…”

zh.symbolism: 提醒你：稳定胜过用力。今天只把一件小事做好，其他就让它们简单一点。
zh.appreciation: 观察花瓣里的一个颜色。吸气4拍、呼气6拍。写一句话：“今天我会用___来保持稳定。”

en.symbolism: Almanac mode: it’s a good day to respect cycles — rest when it’s time to rest, and act cleanly when it’s time to act.
en.appreciation: Do one tidy-up pass (60 seconds). Stop as soon as the timer ends.

zh.symbolism: 黄历模式：今天适合尊重节律——该休息就休息，该行动就干净利落。
zh.appreciation: 做一次60秒的快速整理。时间到就停。

en.symbolism: In many East Asian traditions, chrysanthemum carries an autumnal elegance: beauty that doesn’t rush.
en.appreciation: Make tea or warm water. Take three mindful sips and name three things that feel “enough” today.

zh.symbolism: 在一些东方传统里，菊花有清雅的秋意：不急不躁的美。
zh.appreciation: 泡一杯茶或温水。慢慢喝三口，并说出三件“已经足够”的事。

en.symbolism: A quiet reminder that consistency beats intensity. Choose one small thing to do well today, then let the rest be simple.
en.appreciation: Notice one color in the petals. Breathe in for 4 counts, out for 6. Write one sentence: “Today I will keep it steady by…”

zh.symbolism: 提醒你：稳定胜过用力。今天只把一件小事做好，其他就让它们简单一点。
zh.appreciation: 观察花瓣里的一个颜色。吸气4拍、呼气6拍。写一句话：“今天我会用___来保持稳定。”

en.appreciation: Notice one color in the petals. Breathe in for 4 counts, out for 6. Write one sentence: “Today I will keep it steady by…”

zh.appreciation: 观察花瓣里的一个颜色。吸气4拍、呼气6拍。写一句话：“今天我会用___来保持稳定。”

en.appreciation: Notice one color in the petals. Breathe in for 4 counts, out for 6. Write one sentence: “Today I will keep it steady by…”

zh.appreciation: 观察花瓣里的一个颜色。吸气4拍、呼气6拍。写一句话：“今天我会用___来保持稳定。”

en.appreciation: Notice one color in the petals. Breathe in for 4 counts, out for 6. Write one sentence: “Today I will keep it steady by…”

zh.appreciation: 观察花瓣里的一个颜色。吸气4拍、呼气6拍。写一句话：“今天我会用___来保持稳定。”

care.water: Grows in water; keep submerged in a suitable container/pond.
care.temperature: Warm season plant; growth slows in cool weather.

care.water: 水生植物，保持在适合的容器或池塘中。
care.temperature: 喜温暖，天气转凉会减缓生长。

en.symbolism: Lotus is a lesson in clean beginnings: keep your attention on what you can do next, not where you started.
en.appreciation: Wash your hands slowly. As the water runs, pick one thought to release and one intention to keep.

zh.symbolism: 莲花像是在说：起点不重要，下一步更重要。把注意力放在当下能做的事上。
zh.appreciation: 慢慢洗手。水流过时，放下一个念头，留下一个意图。

en.symbolism: Almanac mode: the best growth happens in seasons. Today, do the part that belongs to you and let timing do the rest.
en.appreciation: Choose one “seed action” that takes under 2 minutes. Do it now, then stop.

zh.symbolism: 黄历模式：成长有它的季节。今天只做你该做的那一部分，其他交给时机。
zh.appreciation: 选一个不超过2分钟的“播种动作”，立刻完成，然后就停。

en.symbolism: Omikuji mode: let today be a small reset — not dramatic, just clean.
en.appreciation: Rinse a cup or bowl, then drink water slowly. With each sip, name one thing you can start fresh.

zh.symbolism: 御神签模式：今天适合做一次小小的重启——不必轰烈，只要干净。
zh.appreciation: 冲洗一个杯子或碗，再慢慢喝水。每一口都说出一件可以重新开始的事。

en.symbolism: Lotus is a lesson in clean beginnings: keep your attention on what you can do next, not where you started.
en.appreciation: Wash your hands slowly. As the water runs, pick one thought to release and one intention to keep.

zh.symbolism: 莲花像是在说：起点不重要，下一步更重要。把注意力放在当下能做的事上。
zh.appreciation: 慢慢洗手。水流过时，放下一个念头，留下一个意图。

en.appreciation: Wash your hands slowly. As the water runs, pick one thought to release and one intention to keep.

en.appreciation: Wash your hands slowly. As the water runs, pick one thought to release and one intention to keep.

zh.appreciation: 慢慢洗手。水流过时，放下一个念头，留下一个意图。

care.water: Water sparingly; allow the medium to partly dry.
care.temperature: Comfortable indoor range; avoid cold drafts.

care.water: 少量浇水，基质略干再浇。
care.temperature: 室内常温即可，避免冷风直吹。

en.symbolism: Orchid energy is slow and intentional. Small adjustments compound into elegance.
en.appreciation: Look for one detail you normally miss (a curve, a shadow). Describe it in 10 words.

zh.symbolism: 蝴蝶兰的感觉是慢而笃定。小小的调整，会累积成优雅。
zh.appreciation: 找一个你平时忽略的细节（弧度、阴影）。用10个字描述它。

care.light: Full sun (6+ hours) for best flowering.
care.water: Deep water 1–2×/week; keep foliage dry when possible.
care.temperature: Best around 15–26°C; protect from hard frost.

care.light: 全日照（每天6小时以上）更易开花。
care.water: 每周深浇1–2次，尽量避免叶片长期潮湿。
care.petSafety: 通常无毒，但刺可能划伤。

en.symbolism: Rose asks for sincerity. Give warmth freely, but keep your boundaries clear (thorns and all).
en.appreciation: Smell something pleasant (soap, tea, a flower). Let it be the whole moment for 15 seconds.

zh.symbolism: 玫瑰提醒你真诚：把温柔给出去，也把边界留好（就像它的刺）。
zh.appreciation: 闻一闻让你舒服的气味（香皂、茶、花）。用15秒只做这一件事。

en.symbolism: Zodiac mode: lead with your heart, but tell the truth about what you can and can’t give today.
en.appreciation: Write a 1-line note to someone (or yourself): “Here’s what I genuinely appreciate about you…”

zh.symbolism: 星座模式：用真心行动，但也坦白今天你能给与不能给的。
zh.appreciation: 写一句话给某个人（或自己）：“我真心欣赏你的是……”

en.symbolism: Tarot mode: the message is commitment — pick one thing that matters and give it an honest “yes”.
en.appreciation: Place a hand over your chest and ask: “What do I truly want to protect today?” Write the first answer.

zh.symbolism: 塔罗模式：今天的信息是承诺——挑一件重要的事，对它真诚地说“是”。
zh.appreciation: 把手放在胸口，问自己：“今天我真正想守护的是什么？”把第一反应写下来。

en.symbolism: Rose asks for sincerity. Give warmth freely, but keep your boundaries clear (thorns and all).
en.appreciation: Smell something pleasant (soap, tea, a flower). Let it be the whole moment for 15 seconds.

zh.symbolism: 玫瑰提醒你真诚：把温柔给出去，也把边界留好（就像它的刺）。
zh.appreciation: 闻一闻让你舒服的气味（香皂、茶、花）。用15秒只做这一件事。

en.appreciation: Smell something pleasant (soap, tea, a flower). Let it be the whole moment for 15 seconds.

zh.appreciation: 闻一闻让你舒服的气味（香皂、茶、花）。用15秒只做这一件事。

care.water: Water when top soil dries; avoid chronic drought in pots.
盆栽表土干了再浇，避免长期缺水。

en.symbolism: Sunflower is about choosing your light source. Your attention is fuel — spend it on what grows you.
en.appreciation: Step near a window. Find the brightest spot and let your shoulders soften for one slow breath.

zh.symbolism: 向日葵提醒你选择自己的光。注意力就是燃料，把它给能让你生长的事。
zh.appreciation: 走到窗边，找最亮的一处光，放松肩膀，慢慢呼吸一次。

en.symbolism: Zodiac mode: act like the sun — be consistent, not perfect. Momentum is your magic today.
en.appreciation: Pick one task you can start in 30 seconds. Start it, then decide if you want to continue.

zh.symbolism: 星座模式：像太阳一样行动——稳定，不必完美。今天的魔法是动能。
zh.appreciation: 选一件30秒就能开始的事。先开始，再决定要不要继续。

en.symbolism: Tarot mode: today’s message is illumination — what becomes obvious when you stop negotiating with yourself?
en.appreciation: Pick one decision you’ve been delaying. Write the simplest “yes/no” version of it, then choose.

zh.symbolism: 塔罗模式：今天的信息是照亮——当你不再和自己讨价还价，什么会变得明显？
zh.appreciation: 选一个你一直拖延的决定，把它写成最简单的“是/否”问题，然后做选择。

en.symbolism: Sunflower is about choosing your light source. Your attention is fuel — spend it on what grows you.
en.appreciation: Step near a window. Find the brightest spot and let your shoulders soften for one slow breath.

zh.symbolism: 向日葵提醒你选择自己的光。注意力就是燃料，把它给能让你生长的事。
zh.appreciation: 走到窗边，找最亮的一处光，放松肩膀，慢慢呼吸一次。
